---
title: "Papers"
listing:
  contents:
    - _content/**/paper.qmd
    - _content/**/paper.ipynb
    - _content/**/paper.tex
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: false
page-layout: full
---

Research papers — formal write-ups, work in progress, and finalized publications.
